about.label: About
about.text: Frontend Engineer with <highlight>8+ years of experience</highlight> building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and modern frameworks such as Next.js and Angular. Experienced in developing products across fintech, logistics, and e-commerce, including SaaS platforms, internal dashboards, and full-featured e-commerce systems. Passionate about building high-performance user interfaces and delivering maintainable, scalable frontend architecture.

1.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Developed and maintained internal logistics web applications using React and TypeScript to support operational workflows.
Built scalable and reusable UI components for internal operational systems.
Improved application reliability by implementing unit testing and enforcing best practices for frontend code quality.
Collaborated with backend engineers, product managers, and QA engineers in an agile environment to deliver new features and system improvements.
Conducted code reviews and maintained coding standards across the frontend team.
Participated in technical interviews for frontend engineer candidates.

2.title: Frontend Engineer
description: Developed and maintained the Tunaiku web application, a fintech platform providing online collateral-free loans.
Implemented new features and resolved production issues using the Angular framework.
Built reusable and maintainable frontend components to improve development efficiency.
Collaborated with backend engineers, product managers, and QA engineers in an agile development environment.
Ensured application stability by writing clean and well-tested code.
Mentored junior frontend developers and contributed to knowledge sharing within the team.

3.title: Frontend Engineer
description: Contributed to the development of Mytra.id, an on-demand service platform for booking professional services.
Built responsive user interfaces for services including MyGuard (security personnel) and MyDriver (personal driver).
Developed and maintained frontend features using Backbone.js and jQuery.
Ensured a consistent and user-friendly experience across multiple devices and screen sizes.
Worked closely with backend engineers and product teams to implement new product features.

4.title: Helpdesk Provisioning
description: Monitored and supported new IndiHome installation orders as part of the PCC operations team.
Troubleshot network configuration issues related to IP, Port, and VLAN.
Generated daily operational reports to support service delivery monitoring.
Developed internal web applications using PHP and MySQL to streamline the monitoring of installation orders.
Built tools for tracking installation progress, managing reports, and updating order statuses.

1.title: Sabina by Selly
description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce web platform for a Muslim fashion brand.
Built customer-facing features including product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and user account pages.
Integrated Midtrans payment gateway to enable secure online transactions.
Integrated Biteship API to automate shipping cost calculation and delivery management.
Designed and implemented an admin dashboard for managing products, orders, promotions, and customer data.
Developed responsive and reusable UI components using Next.js.

2.title: Medina Invitation
description: Built a web platform enabling couples to create and share digital wedding invitations.
Developed responsive invitation pages displaying event details, venue information, and schedules.
Implemented RSVP management features for tracking guest attendance and responses.
Developed backend APIs using Express.js for managing invitation content and guest data.
Designed and managed relational database schemas using PostgreSQL.

3.title: Vote
description: Developed a web application to record and monitor election results in real time.
Built responsive user interfaces using Next.js.
Implemented result submission features allowing polling station witnesses to input election data.
Developed REST APIs using Express.js to handle result submission and data retrieval.
Designed and managed relational data storage using PostgreSQL.
Built monitoring dashboards enabling political parties and candidates to track election results across polling stations.

4.title: DriverDay.id
description: Developed a company profile website for car rental and driver services.
Built responsive user interfaces using Next.js.
Implemented SEO optimization using Next.js SSR and static generation.
Created article pages to improve organic search visibility and increase website traffic.
Optimized page performance and site structure to support better search engine indexing.

5.title: SruwalApparel.id
description: Developed a company profile website for a clothing brand.
Built responsive user interfaces using Next.js.
Implemented SEO optimization using Next.js SSR and static generation.
Created article pages to improve organic search visibility and increase website traffic.
Optimized page performance and site structure to support better search engine indexing.

6.title: Virtuathlon
description: Contributed to the development of a mobile application for participating in virtual sports challenges.
Built responsive mobile user interfaces using React Native.
Implemented features to support activity tracking and challenge participation.
Collaborated with the development team to integrate mobile interfaces with backend services.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out through any of these channels!
